mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_bill_entry WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND material_id = #{materialId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_inventory WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND material_id = #{materialId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_dep_inventory WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND material_id = #{materialId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM bas_apply_entry e INNER JOIN bas_apply a ON a.id = e.paren_id WHERE IFNULL(e.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND IFNULL(a.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND e.material_id = #{materialId} AND a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM dep_purchase_apply_entry e INNER JOIN dep_purchase_apply p ON p.id = e.parent_id WHERE IFNULL(e.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND IFNULL(p.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND e.material_id = #{materialId} AND p.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM t_hc_ks_xh_entry e INNER JOIN t_hc_ks_xh m ON m.id = e.paren_id WHERE IFNULL(e.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND IFNULL(m.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND e.material_id = #{materialId} AND m.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_order_entry e INNER JOIN gz_order o ON o.id = e.paren_id WHERE IFNULL(e.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND IFNULL(o.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND e.material_id = #{materialId} AND o.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_shipment_entry e INNER JOIN gz_shipment s ON s.id = e.paren_id WHERE IFNULL(e.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND IFNULL(s.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND e.material_id = #{materialId} AND s.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_dep_inventory WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND material_id = #{materialId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_depot_inventory WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND material_id = #{materialId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_stocktaking_entry e INNER JOIN stk_io_stocktaking s ON s.id = e.paren_id WHERE IFNULL(e.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND IFNULL(s.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND e.material_id = #{materialId} AND s.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM wh_warehouse_apply_entry e INNER JOIN wh_warehouse_apply w ON w.id = e.paren_id WHERE IFNULL(e.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND IFNULL(w.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND e.material_id = #{materialId} AND w.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 ) biz

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_bill WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_inventory WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM bas_apply WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM dep_purchase_apply WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM t_hc_ks_xh WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_order WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_shipment WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_depot_inventory WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_stocktaking WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM wh_warehouse_apply WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_refund_goods WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_refund_stock WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 ) biz

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_bill WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND suppler_id = #{supplierId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_bill_entry WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM gz_order WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND suppler_id = #{supplierId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_stocktaking WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND suppler_id = #{supplierId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 ) biz

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM stk_inventory WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND factory_id = #{factoryId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_dep_inventory WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND factory_id = #{factoryId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM t_hc_ks_xh_entry e INNER JOIN t_hc_ks_xh m ON m.id = e.paren_id WHERE IFNULL(e.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND IFNULL(m.del_flag, 0) != 1 AND e.factory_id = #{factoryId} AND m.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_bill_entry WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND material_factory_id = #{factoryId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM t_hc_ck_flow WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND factory_id = #{factoryId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM t_hc_ks_flow WHERE IFNULL(del_flag, 0) != 1 AND factory_id = #{factoryId} AND tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} LIMIT 1 ) biz
